001package com.github.tommyettinger.tantrum.regexodus;
002
003import org.apache.fory.config.Config;
004import org.apache.fory.context.ReadContext;
005import org.apache.fory.context.WriteContext;
006import org.apache.fory.memory.BoundsChecking;
007import org.apache.fory.memory.MemoryBuffer;
008import org.apache.fory.memory.Platform;
009import org.apache.fory.serializer.Serializer;
010import regexodus.ds.CharBitSet;
011
012public class CharBitSetSerializer extends Serializer<CharBitSet> {
013    public CharBitSetSerializer(Config fory) {
014        super(fory, CharBitSet.class, false);
015    }
016
017    @Override
018    public void write(final WriteContext fory, final CharBitSet data) {
019        final int[] bits = data.getRawBits();
020        fory.getBuffer().writePrimitiveArrayWithSize(bits, Platform.INT_ARRAY_OFFSET, bits.length << 2);
021    }
022
023    @Override
024    public CharBitSet read(ReadContext fory) {
025        final CharBitSet obs = new CharBitSet();
026        obs.setRawBits(readIntsAndSize(fory.getBuffer()));
027        return obs;
028    }
029
030    /**
031     * This method should be used to read data written by
032     * {@link MemoryBuffer#writePrimitiveArrayWithSize(Object, int, int)}.
033     */
034    private static int[] readIntsAndSize(MemoryBuffer buffer) {
035        final int numBytes = buffer.readVarUint32();
036        int readerIdx = buffer.readerIndex();
037        final int size = buffer.size();
038        // use subtract to avoid overflow
039        if (BoundsChecking.BOUNDS_CHECKING_ENABLED && readerIdx > size - numBytes) {
040            throw new IndexOutOfBoundsException(
041                    String.format(
042                            "readerIdx(%d) + length(%d) exceeds size(%d): %s", readerIdx, numBytes, size, buffer));
043        }
044        final int[] ints = new int[numBytes >>> 2];
045        Platform.copyMemory(
046                buffer.getHeapMemory(), buffer.getUnsafeAddress() + readerIdx, ints, Platform.INT_ARRAY_OFFSET, numBytes);
047        buffer._increaseReaderIndexUnsafe(numBytes);
048        return ints;
049    }
050
051}
